description: MegaMart has recently been acquired by 'Global Retail Inc.' and you need to update the global settings and policies in Snipe-IT. Update the site name to 'Global Retail Assets', the default currency to 'GBP', the support email to 'it-support@globalretail.com', and the header color to '#0055A4'. Additionally, update the 'Laptops' and 'Tablets' categories to require users to confirm acceptance of assets and to send emails to users on checkin/checkout. Do not modify other categories.
